chunks.text: Course: CS 269 | EECS at UC Berkeley CS 269. Advanced Topics in Distributed Computing Systems Catalog Description: Building distributed computing systems, issues and techniques; communication, distributed data, identification of resources and their distributed management, decentralized synchronization mechanisms, security and protection, performance and modeling of distributed systems, programming language and system support for distributed applications. Units: 2 Prerequisites: 162; 262 recommended. Formats: Spring: 2 hours of lecture per week Fall: 2 hours of lecture per week Grading basis: letter Final exam status: Written final exam conducted during the scheduled final exam period Class homepage on inst.eecs Related Areas: Operating Systems & Networking (OSNT)
